lessons: Ownership-transfer fees: the gov.il fee board (drivers-car-license-fee-boards, 'אגרות שינוי רישום הבעלות', effective 2026-04-01) gives online 235 / post office 257 for 'רכב מנועי מכל סוג'. The research agent's 206/219 were the SUPERSEDED pre-April-2026 values, briefly applied then reverted. Online stayed 235 (unchanged); post office 250->257. LESSON: a research agent citing insurance/CPA blogs (lbr.co.il) can be stale vs the gov.il fee board, the Judge + a Playwright read of the gov.il board are authoritative for fees. Verify fees on gov.il, not secondary blogs.

STALE fix: annual test (mivchan rishyon) fees, new price list effective 2026-06-01 (after the last review): private car 119->126, EV 100->106 (two mentions, the Costs list AND the EV note), motorcycle 75->80.

STALE fix: annual licensing-fee range floor was ~1,200; the April-2026 table floor is ~850 (older low-group cars pay less). Ceiling 'over 5,000' updated to 'over 5,300'. Added the EV tax-benefit ceiling drop specificity (NIS 30,000 in 2025 -> NIS 22,000 in 2026).

VERIFIED OK (no change): April-2026 CPI licensing hike (22->132 NIS), Rashut HaShidur ~135 bundled, EV purchase tax 48% (was 45%, Treasury proposed 52%), new-car test exemption 3y private / 2y rental, 15-day transfer deadline, ~10-minute online-payment window, mandatory bituach chova for renewal, digital vehicle license via gov.il, late-test fine 250 NIS (first 6 months).

MAJOR fix (expert-found, pre-existing): the expired-test fine was stated as a flat '250 NIS (first 6 months), court after 6 months'. Correct graduated structure (verified): up to 4 months = 250 NIS + 6 license points; 4 months to 1 year = 1,000 NIS + 6 points; over 1 year = court summons. The skill omitted the 1,000 tier + the 6 license points and mis-timed court (1 year, not 6 months). Fixed EN+HE + evidence.

MAJOR softened (expert-found): the '15 days strict' ownership-transfer deadline is contested (sources cite shorter windows). Reframed to 'register ASAP, the seller stays liable until the transfer is recorded'; kept the 15-day kolzchut figure with a caveat. CARRY: verify the exact statutory window against the current תקנות התעבורה.

CARRY (minors): surface the all-in test cost (~300-500 NIS at the station vs the ~126 NIS agra); re-verify the e-bike/kalanoit registration date + plate fee against the gov.il fee board; confirm or generalize the 'TesTime' SMS-booking product name.

WATCH (tooling): editing the transfer-fee 250 in evidence broke the justification for the separate late-test-fine 250 (the only '250 שקל' token was the transfer one). When changing a figure that another claim relies on for token coverage, re-add the token to the other claim. Same lesson as the war-damage 52,750 substring incident.

Added a qualitative used-car value-estimation block (Step 4) from a WhatsApp community request. A computational checker was ruled out: the Levi Yitzhak base price + adjustment percentages are proprietary; the only public figures (BL Circular 2044's 10/11%) are narrow disability-accessory depreciation. So the block points to the public MOT pricelist + Levi Yitzhak and lists the adjustment FACTORS qualitatively, no invented percentages.

Expert review corrected two accuracy points: Levi Yitzhak is a PAID product (only carlistprice.mot.gov.il is free), and carlistprice is the MOT official reference price used to compute the transfer fee (runs lower than the commercial price), NOT an aggregation of reported transfer prices. Added שינוי מבנה (structural change) and יבוא מקביל/אישי (parallel/personal import) as missing value factors.
